_publications._publicationTitle: MAF mediates crosstalk between Ras-MAPK and mTOR signaling in NF1.

_contextSnippet: Western blot analysis of S462-TY cells transduced with inducible MAF showed increased phosphorylation of S6
details: Detected increased phosphorylation of S6 in MAF overexpressing cells and decreased pS6 staining due to RAD001 inhibition in tumor xenografts
